title: rhododendron × erythrocalyx
intro: Rhododendron × erythrocalyx is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between the rhododendron and the azalea. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Rhododendron × erythrocalyx include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and ease digestive problems. Rhododendron × erythrocalyx is prepared as a tea or decoction, and also used in herbal infusions and tinctures, although it's essential to consult a medical professional before using it as a treatment.
